cn.releaseNotes:
全球超百万玩家上头的女帝模拟器、真人实拍互动影视新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇现已全球多平台同步上线！《隐形守护者》开发团队 New One Studio 倾力打造！

约1000分钟超长真人演绎全新篇章，批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手斡旋朝野势力；结盟翻盘周旋怀柔，在真伪难辨的后宫博弈与惊心动魄的朝堂交锋中步步为营。从命悬一线到权倾天下，百种活法闯出重围！

【能问鼎的互动爽剧，活下来就登基】 从身处绝境到走上权力巅峰，或踏平肃清、或从容化解，这条路上胆敢阻扰你的一切，终将烟消云散。权倾朝野、各掌一方的朝臣势力...当他们向你奉上一片赤诚，你是选择以真情相报、共担风雨，还是不动声色，将这份情意悉数纳入局中，化为勘破天下、执掌乾坤的一枚枚棋子？活成只属于自己的爽剧主角，万般抉择，终成你的盛世天下。

【4K再现传统美学，沉浸体验盛世风华】 从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐；从实景搭建的恢弘宫苑，到立体鲜活的人物刻画。媚娘篇和女帝篇共约1500分钟超长真人实拍篇章，搭配最高4K质感呈现，力求呈现东方宫阙的磅礴气象，带你亲身谱写一场波澜壮阔的东方权谋华章。

【深度交互升级，指尖上的施政博弈】 权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡！批阅奏折，指尖轻点，趣解百态民生；颁布圣旨，御笔轻悬，执掌群臣荣辱。是严明法度、肃清朝纲，还是广施仁政、怀柔天下？在重重掣肘中施展帝王权术，开创你的盛世！ 还有升级版专属帝王测试报告，深度剖析你的权谋风骨、危机决断与御人之道。在故事的结束，遇见最真实的自己。

《盛世天下》女帝篇，现已正式上线！立即下载体验，你的盛世，由你执掌！
cn.description:
本作品需全程联网。媚娘篇内容共为十六集，女帝篇内容共为三十二集，均含免费体验章节。

● 能互动的爽剧，活下来就登基！百万销量口碑新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇正式上线

全球百万销量、斩获多项年度大奖的《盛世天下》媚娘篇新篇现已全球多平台正式上线！
立即体验这场惊心动魄的朝堂博弈，共同踏上女帝传奇登顶之路！你的每一个选择，都在塑造独一无二的剧情体验。

《盛世天下》女帝篇开启全新剧情与抉择：
——约1000分钟超长真人实拍篇章（较媚娘篇剧情扩容超2倍）
——4K电影级画面质感，沉浸体验盛世风华
——全新深度交互玩法：批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手执掌朝堂格局
——升级版专属人格测试：在故事的最后遇见真实的自己

● 4K电影级质感，极致东方宫廷盛宴
全程真人演绎、实景搭建，以4K电影的光影调度，匠心复刻东方宫阙的磅礴气象。从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐，全方位展现极致的东方古典美学。
由官鸿、黄羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演员倾情出演。更具真实惊险刺激的体验、更恢弘的场景、更细腻的人物刻画，让盛世不止存在于荧幕之中，而真实铺展于眼前。你将亲身体验“君临天下”的东方美学盛宴！

● 从默默无闻少女到传奇女帝，你的剧本你来写！
想冲破命运的裹挟？在本作中，你将体验到最惊心动魄的宫廷权谋博弈！从默默无闻的少女，到在多方势力的掣肘中破局，最终登顶权力巅峰。感受运筹帷幄、制衡朝野的帝王智慧，这条逆天改命的登基之路，由你亲手开创！

● 约1500分钟真人演绎内容，沉浸体验帝王人生
匠心打磨的媚娘篇与女帝篇共约1500分钟实拍篇章，为你铺陈开一幅波澜壮阔的盛世画卷。面对波谲云诡的朝堂局势，你的每一次落子、每一个抉择，都将引发蝴蝶效应。高燃反转、重重悬疑……在步步惊心中执掌乾坤，亲手改写王朝命运！
为你情有独钟或爱恨交织的角色打榜助力，谁能问鼎全球人气榜首，全在你的掌控之中。

● 告别旁观，真正体验执掌天下
摒弃枯燥的点击对话，体验深度交互玩法！权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡 ：
【批阅奏折】：指尖轻点，趣解百态民生。面对层出不穷的新奇提案与市井趣事，看你如何妙笔生花、巧思破局，以奇招惠及万民。
【颁布圣旨】：御笔轻悬，执掌群臣荣辱。看你如何恩威并施、论功行赏，通过封赏、发落与追贬，尽显女帝知人善用的御人之道。

● 你是什么类型的帝王？专属人格测试报告升级
在故事的终点，你还将获得一份升级版专属帝王测试报告！深度剖析你的权谋风格、危机决策与御人手段。究竟是权情兼收、八面玲珑的“绝命鹤顶红”，至情至性、赴汤蹈火的“风月曼陀罗”，还是心狠手辣、一心问鼎的“卷王见手青”？在故事的终点，看见最真实的自己，生成你的专属人格图鉴分享给全世界！

cn.description:
这个App可以让你更专注地工作或学习，戒掉手机瘾，让你在工作或学习的时候远离手机，提高工作和学习的效率。

当开启了不玩手机警报后，你在设定的时间里拿起手机将会报警，这将培养你更专注于学习或工作的习惯。

App使用方法：
1. 选择要集中精力工作的时间间隔。

2. 把手机放在水平桌面上。

3. 点击开始按钮。

4. 直接按下锁定屏幕按钮。

5. 开始并专注于你的工作或学习。
快来和我们一起进步吧！！！

1. 该服务是订阅制的收费服务，这意味着您将为未来的订阅使用而提前预支费用。当前您可以选择以按季度的方式来使用该服务。在每个订阅周期即将结束时，您的订阅默认将自动续费，除非您自行取消自动续费，或者由我们取消该服务。
2. 取消订阅:如需取消续订，请至少提前24小时操作取消。您可以通过如下方法取消：打开系统设置 - 点击Apple ID - 点击订阅 - 选择高级版，取消订阅即可。
3. 恢复购买:如果在支付过程中，收到提示 “您目前已经订阅该项目”，并且确定之前完成了购买，可以点击右上角 “恢复购买” 进行购买恢复。

hk.releaseNotes:
【新增】重新設計UI，更為容易使用和視覺上更吸引。
【新增】可將食物的重量轉換成不同的單位，並計算單位價格以作比較。
【新增】食物過期提示預報，並建議使用那些食物的菜譜。
【新增】在自動創建的菜籃子項目中提醒已經購買的食物。

【新增】使用語音識別於適合的地方，讓你更加易於使用。

【優化】優化用戶體驗。
【修復】修復小問題
hk.description:
這絕不是另一個普通的食譜應用程式，App Store上已經有大量類似的應用程式！
我們開發這款應用程式是因為我們對烹飪有著真摯的熱情，並且注意到現有的應用程式缺乏集中必要烹飪工具的功能。

我們的應用程式充滿了強大的烹飪工具，將革新您的廚房體驗：
• 輕鬆地儲存和檢索您最喜愛的烹飪網站的食譜，讓所有烹飪靈感盡在指尖。
• 及時收到食材到期的提醒，搜尋能最大程度利用食材的創意菜餚。
• 無縫地將您的食譜選擇整合到您的餐飲計劃中，讓應用程式自動更新您的購物清單。
• 透過Siri直接從您的iPhone或iPad的主畫面或其他應用程式中輕鬆訪問本應用程式的功能，體驗絕佳的便利性。
• 通過將食譜直接存儲在您的設備上能保護您的隱私，避免許多烹飪網站和應用程式現今所涉及的追蹤和上傳個人信息。
• 為了讓您使用更加方便，我們在適當的地方加入語音識別，確保無縫和用戶友好的界面。
• 需要調整食材數量嗎？只需點擊一下，我們的應用程式將為您重新計算所有其他食材的數量。不再繁瑣計算或浪費時間。
• 在購物時，我們為您提供全方位支持。我們的應用程式智能地合併多個食譜中的食材，創建一份方便有序的購物清單。不再混亂或猜測。購買您喜愛的食材從未如此輕鬆。
• 我們理解每個廚師都有自己的喜好。因此，根據您的烹飪經驗和結果，我們的應用程式允許您記錄筆記，設定食材的數量，甚至可以根據您手邊的食材搜尋食譜。我們致力於讓烹飪過程符合您獨特的口味和便利需求。
• 整潔地列出和展開食材清單，便於烹飪前的準備。
• 通過上下文相關的設定和幫助，您將很快感受到自己像一名專業廚師。

我們的努力並未止步於此。我們的應用程式還提供一系列方便的烹飪工具，如計時器、重量和價格轉換器、簡單計算器等。我們隨時歡迎提供其他能增強您烹飪體驗的工具。

聲明: 
安裝應用程序後顯示的食譜僅用於演示。 食譜的版權屬於網頁中食譜分享的作者。 如果您是食譜的作者之一，並且希望取消您在本應用程序内的食譜分享，請告訴我們，我們將盡快將其刪除。

hk.description:
Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King.

Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back.

Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

hk.releaseNotes: Improved compatibility with 120 hz screen refresh rate on the new iPhone and iPad models.
hk.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

hk.releaseNotes:
[v0.4.2 更新]
- 陷阱調整：範圍陷阱在敵人豁免成功時也會造成一半傷害，單體陷阱冷卻降至1。
- 提升「泰坦鐵拳」和「奧術貫穿炮」陷阱的基礎傷害。
- 經驗值系統優化：提升基礎經驗值，使未參與戰鬥的單位和設施也能獲得經驗。
- 移除部分技能上多餘的「範圍(AoE)」標籤。
- 徹底修復事件介面「?」按鈕無回應的問題。
hk.description:
「在遺失記憶的盡頭，奪回真正的魔王寶座！」

成為魔王，構築你專屬的無情地牢。
探索世界，集結散落各地的魔物，佈置致命陷阱，讓無禮的入侵者走向毀滅。

死亡並非終點，而是全新力量的開端。在Roguelike無盡的輪迴中，將你的地牢打造成最完美、最恐怖的堡壘！

[打造專屬地牢與防線]
你的策略就是魔王城的最高法則。在地圖各處佈置豐富多樣的戰鬥房間、凶險的建築與致命陷阱，為蜂擁而至的勇者們設計完美的「殺戮地帶（Kill Zone）」。

[組建強大的魔物大軍]
探索世界，喚醒沉睡中的各色怪物。將能力各異的魔物招入麾下，把它們培養成最強軍團，指揮前線作戰。

[釋放壓倒性的魔王權能]
入侵者正逼近地牢的核心嗎？解放魔王內心深處潛藏的真正力量吧。用足以瞬間逆轉戰局的毀滅性權能，讓傲慢的敵人屈膝臣服。

[難以預測的Roguelike變數]
每一次探索都會開啟全新的道路。收集隱藏在地牢各處的神秘遺物，化解未知而離奇的事件，讓你的部隊變得更加強大。你的選擇將決定下一場戰鬥的命運。

[記憶碎片與真正的覺醒]
即使戰敗倒下也絕不要停下腳步。收集過去遺失的記憶與遺產，覺醒魔王真正的力量。跨越死亡，奪回永遠無法被抹殺的絕對權威！

現在就坐上王座，統治你那宏偉而殘酷的專屬地牢吧！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

hk.description:
《Digline》是一款輕鬆上手的鑽探遊戲。每一次向地下深入，都是一場在進度與風險之間的抉擇，而真正的獎勵，總藏在更深的地底。

每次探險都從你的工坊開始。選擇裝備，駕駛燃料有限、設備簡陋的鑽探機出發。開鑿屬於自己的路線，穿越不斷變化的地層，決定要收集哪些資源，並在燃料耗盡前，思考該升級什麼、交易什麼。

每一次下潛，都可能發現新的材料、更稀有的礦物，以及地底深處意想不到的規律。原本只是單純的挖掘，逐漸演變成探索、效率與時機掌握之間的巧妙平衡。

回到地面後，持續優化你的策略，讓每一次探險都更有效率：

• 升級鑽頭、燃料容量與鑽探效率
• 解鎖價值更高、埋藏更深的新材料
• 規劃最佳路線，讓每一次下潛都收穫滿滿

你的進度會穩定累積，但每一次探險都充滿張力。太過保守，就會錯失珍貴資源；冒險太深，則可能失去一切。

打造屬於自己的探勘節奏：快速有效率的短程挖掘、高風險高報酬的深層探險，或穩紮穩打，逐步征服地底世界。

曾登上美國、英國休閒遊戲排行榜前 10 名，以及德國、挪威等多國前 5 名。現在就加入這場挖掘冒險吧！

原本只是尋找資源的旅程，卻漸漸變得更加神秘。你挖出的隧道會永久保留，地圖會隨著探索不斷擴展，而地下世界也開始不像隨機生成，更像是一個擁有自己歷史的地方。

《Digline》設計理念就是容易上手、適合利用零碎時間遊玩，同時又能帶來長期的成就感。快速開挖、短程探險，享受源源不絕的輕鬆樂趣。

特色：

• 直覺式單指直向操作
• 每次探險只需一、兩分鐘，隨時都能遊玩
• 永久保留的地下隧道，以及持續擴展的地圖
• 多個地下區域，各自擁有不同的資源、危險與驚喜
• 收集資源，用於製作升級與更完善的探險準備
• 工坊系統，讓每一次成功探險都化為永久成長
• 市場交易系統，出售帶回來的資源
• 跨越多次遊戲持續累積的成長，而非單次探險
• 寧靜舒適的氛圍，搭配充滿探索感的地下世界
• 無廣告，沒有任何付費才能獲勝的機制
• 應玩家熱烈要求，現在可選擇購買燃料，繼續向更深處前進，但不需任何付費也能完整體驗整個遊戲
• 成就系統與「每日挖掘」排行榜競賽

挖得越深，礦坑揭露的秘密就越多。

这个App可以让你更专注地工作或学习，戒掉手机瘾，让你在工作或学习的时候远离手机，提高工作和学习的效率。

就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點

hk.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

請於倉庫中確認道具

錯誤修正
- 在「死亡挑戰」模式中，已損毀的武器現在會正確保留其損毀狀態和外觀，並延續至下一場戰鬥。
- 修正了在「死亡挑戰」模式中，選擇「選擇另一名頭目」或「從頭開始」後，已損毀武器未被修復的問題。
- 修正了「銜尾蛇之眼」握柄謊言戰技的增傷效果未正確生效的問題。
- 修正了當武器耐久度降為0時關閉遊戲，重新啟動後武器會錯誤顯示為已損毀狀態的錯誤
- 修正了已損毀武器在開始下一輪遊戲時耐久度未恢復的問題。
- 修正了戰鬥中某些敵人的迴避動作會錯誤觸發「旋風護符」效果的問題。
- 修正了特定情況下「銳利管子」無法對某些怪物造成傷害的問題。
- 修正了頭目戰「冠軍」維克多進入第二階段後，其第一階段型態偶爾會短暫殘留的問題。
- 修正了頭目「雙面監督者」的入場動畫偶爾無法正確播放的問題。
- 優化了一些NPC的對話順序，讓交流更自然流暢。
- 修正了角色可移動至正常路線外非預期區域的錯誤。
- 修正了「死亡自我素」偶爾會在非預期位置掉落的問題。
- 修正了無法透過「校正P器官」解鎖「極限潛能」成就的問題。
-- 遇到此問題的玩家在更新後載入受影響的存檔即可解鎖該成就。
- 修正了波蘭語和日語版本成就描述中的文字錯誤。
- 修正了[設定 → 遊戲 → 動態模糊]選項未正確生效的問題。

已知問題
- 在標題畫面購買《P的謊言：序曲》的過程中，畫面會變更為「無邊框畫面模式」，並導致原本設定的解析度被重設的問題。
請在［設定 → 圖形］中，將畫面模式與解析度調整為您想要的數值後再進入遊戲。
造成您的不便，我們深感抱歉
hk.description:
你是吉佩托創造的人偶，陷入由謊言編織而成的羅網之中；你和降臨在《Lies of P》世界的事件之間，存在著難以想像的怪物和不可信賴的人物。
 
一個神秘的聲音將你喚醒，它引領你穿梭在瘟疫肆虐的克拉特市；這座曾經蓬勃發展的城市，如今已被瘋狂與血腥所毒害。在我們的魂系遊戲中，你必須調整自己和你的武器面對數不清的恐懼，解開城市精英們深不可測的秘密，並且在尋找自我的旅程中，選擇是否以真相面對困境，還是編織謊言克服困境。

- 陰鬱而優雅的殘酷世界
揭開克拉特城的秘密；這是一座曾經浸淫在「美好年代」風格的城市，也曾因為人偶產業而蓬勃發展，但如今，街頭滿是腥風血雨。
 
- 與變形的器械作戰
組合各種動態武器，充分利用軍團機械臂並啟動新技能，藉此發展出獨特的戰鬥風格以迎戰各種邪惡敵人與地形。
 
- 為何說謊？
許多時候，你得面臨抉擇；是否該用謊言撫慰悲傷絕望的人們，還是選擇告訴他們真相。
為自己劈荊斬棘。

- 重塑經典
體驗《木偶奇遇記》這部廣受喜愛的童話故事，遊戲中改以黑暗、冷酷的敘事讓玩家挖掘隱藏在《Lies of P》世界裡的秘密與符號。

hk.description:
傳奇遊戲製作人小島秀夫帶來顛覆傳統的遊戲體驗，在這無可比擬的《死亡擱淺導演剪輯版》中加以擴展。 
 
在未來，一場名為「死亡擱淺」的神秘事件，開啟了生死兩界間的大門，彼世的生物在殘破不堪、關係疏離的末日世界四處遊蕩。 
 
玩家扮演山姆·布橋斯，一肩扛起責任，在面目全非的美國聯繫僅餘的倖存者，為人類社會帶來希望。 
你能一步步重新聯繫這個分崩離析的世界嗎？ 
 
《死亡擱淺導演剪輯版》Mac 版充分運用如 MetalFX Upscaling 等 Metal 3 功能，帶來無與倫比的精細畫質與驚人的效能。此外還包含高幀率的拍照模式，以及與 Valve Corporation 的《HALF-LIFE》系列和 CD Projekt Red 的 《電馭叛客 2077》的聯動內容。使用 Social Strand System™ 與全球玩家保持連繫。

Mac 與 iOS
• 如欲遊玩此產品，需登入 iCloud 並啟動 iCloudDrive。
• 此產品可離線遊玩，但若想完整體驗 Social Strand System™ 的功能，則必須使用網路連線。線上遊玩時會產生電信費用。

iOS 版專屬說明
• 首次遊玩此產品時，您需下載額外資料。下載約 13 GB 的遊戲內容後即可開始遊玩，但隨著遊戲進行將持續下載額外遊戲內容，總共需下載約 50 GB 的資料。如欲使用多種語言的語音資料，需下載額外內容。

FAQs

mo.description:
Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King.

Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back.

Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

mo.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

mo.description:
「在遺失記憶的盡頭，奪回真正的魔王寶座！」

成為魔王，構築你專屬的無情地牢。
探索世界，集結散落各地的魔物，佈置致命陷阱，讓無禮的入侵者走向毀滅。

死亡並非終點，而是全新力量的開端。在Roguelike無盡的輪迴中，將你的地牢打造成最完美、最恐怖的堡壘！

[打造專屬地牢與防線]
你的策略就是魔王城的最高法則。在地圖各處佈置豐富多樣的戰鬥房間、凶險的建築與致命陷阱，為蜂擁而至的勇者們設計完美的「殺戮地帶（Kill Zone）」。

[組建強大的魔物大軍]
探索世界，喚醒沉睡中的各色怪物。將能力各異的魔物招入麾下，把它們培養成最強軍團，指揮前線作戰。

[釋放壓倒性的魔王權能]
入侵者正逼近地牢的核心嗎？解放魔王內心深處潛藏的真正力量吧。用足以瞬間逆轉戰局的毀滅性權能，讓傲慢的敵人屈膝臣服。

[難以預測的Roguelike變數]
每一次探索都會開啟全新的道路。收集隱藏在地牢各處的神秘遺物，化解未知而離奇的事件，讓你的部隊變得更加強大。你的選擇將決定下一場戰鬥的命運。

[記憶碎片與真正的覺醒]
即使戰敗倒下也絕不要停下腳步。收集過去遺失的記憶與遺產，覺醒魔王真正的力量。跨越死亡，奪回永遠無法被抹殺的絕對權威！

現在就坐上王座，統治你那宏偉而殘酷的專屬地牢吧！

mo.description:
这个App可以让你更专注地工作或学习，戒掉手机瘾，让你在工作或学习的时候远离手机，提高工作和学习的效率。

当开启了不玩手机警报后，你在设定的时间里拿起手机将会报警，这将培养你更专注于学习或工作的习惯。

App使用方法：

2. 把手机放在水平桌面上。

3. 点击开始按钮。

4. 直接按下锁定屏幕按钮。

快来和我们一起进步吧！！！

mo.description:
為了洗雪兩年前敗北的恥辱，混沌這次集結了異星的聯軍，以人類的罪孽為理由，再次襲擊地球。
就連一直捍衛人類的那位超級英雄，也決定倒戈相向。身為指揮官的你，要如何解決這個危機？人類和地球的明天，又會是如何？

遊戲介紹與特點
怪獸大進擊2，是我們在兩年前發售的好評作品，怪獸大進擊的續作。我們在保留一代的優點上，修改了缺點，並加入了許多新的特點和樂趣如下：
- 遊戲節奏更快速、更緊湊。
- 在原有的三種方塊外，新增資金方塊的蒐集使用。
- 秘密武器的部署不限一種，可部署複數種類在戰場上。
- 全新九種外星敵人，更聰明刁鑽的行為AI，提升挑戰性。
- 全新八種秘密武器，包含可三機分離、合體的超級機器人。

mo.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

mo.releaseNotes:
[更新 1.11.3]

注意事項
- 使用未經開發商正式發布的軟體或數據可能會導致遊戲異常關閉
- 為了正常遊玩遊戲，請將遊戲保持在最新版本。
若未更新至最新版本，可能會發生閃退、數據儲存錯誤以及無法復原的數據毀損等問題
特別是首次遊玩《P的謊言》的玩家，請務必先將遊戲更新至最新版本後再開始遊戲。
- 若背包無剩餘空間，獲得的道具將自動移至倉庫
請於倉庫中確認道具

錯誤修正
- 在「死亡挑戰」模式中，已損毀的武器現在會正確保留其損毀狀態和外觀，並延續至下一場戰鬥。
- 修正了在「死亡挑戰」模式中，選擇「選擇另一名頭目」或「從頭開始」後，已損毀武器未被修復的問題。
- 修正了「銜尾蛇之眼」握柄謊言戰技的增傷效果未正確生效的問題。
- 修正了當武器耐久度降為0時關閉遊戲，重新啟動後武器會錯誤顯示為已損毀狀態的錯誤
- 修正了已損毀武器在開始下一輪遊戲時耐久度未恢復的問題。
- 修正了戰鬥中某些敵人的迴避動作會錯誤觸發「旋風護符」效果的問題。
- 修正了特定情況下「銳利管子」無法對某些怪物造成傷害的問題。
- 修正了頭目戰「冠軍」維克多進入第二階段後，其第一階段型態偶爾會短暫殘留的問題。
- 修正了頭目「雙面監督者」的入場動畫偶爾無法正確播放的問題。
- 優化了一些NPC的對話順序，讓交流更自然流暢。
- 修正了角色可移動至正常路線外非預期區域的錯誤。
- 修正了「死亡自我素」偶爾會在非預期位置掉落的問題。
- 修正了無法透過「校正P器官」解鎖「極限潛能」成就的問題。
-- 遇到此問題的玩家在更新後載入受影響的存檔即可解鎖該成就。
- 修正了波蘭語和日語版本成就描述中的文字錯誤。
- 修正了[設定 → 遊戲 → 動態模糊]選項未正確生效的問題。

已知問題
- 在標題畫面購買《P的謊言：序曲》的過程中，畫面會變更為「無邊框畫面模式」，並導致原本設定的解析度被重設的問題。
請在［設定 → 圖形］中，將畫面模式與解析度調整為您想要的數值後再進入遊戲。
造成您的不便，我們深感抱歉
mo.description:
你是吉佩托創造的人偶，陷入由謊言編織而成的羅網之中；你和降臨在《Lies of P》世界的事件之間，存在著難以想像的怪物和不可信賴的人物。
 
一個神秘的聲音將你喚醒，它引領你穿梭在瘟疫肆虐的克拉特市；這座曾經蓬勃發展的城市，如今已被瘋狂與血腥所毒害。在我們的魂系遊戲中，你必須調整自己和你的武器面對數不清的恐懼，解開城市精英們深不可測的秘密，並且在尋找自我的旅程中，選擇是否以真相面對困境，還是編織謊言克服困境。

- 陰鬱而優雅的殘酷世界
揭開克拉特城的秘密；這是一座曾經浸淫在「美好年代」風格的城市，也曾因為人偶產業而蓬勃發展，但如今，街頭滿是腥風血雨。
 
- 與變形的器械作戰
組合各種動態武器，充分利用軍團機械臂並啟動新技能，藉此發展出獨特的戰鬥風格以迎戰各種邪惡敵人與地形。
 
- 為何說謊？
許多時候，你得面臨抉擇；是否該用謊言撫慰悲傷絕望的人們，還是選擇告訴他們真相。
為自己劈荊斬棘。

- 重塑經典
體驗《木偶奇遇記》這部廣受喜愛的童話故事，遊戲中改以黑暗、冷酷的敘事讓玩家挖掘隱藏在《Lies of P》世界裡的秘密與符號。

mo.description:
傳奇遊戲製作人小島秀夫帶來顛覆傳統的遊戲體驗，在這無可比擬的《死亡擱淺導演剪輯版》中加以擴展。 
 
在未來，一場名為「死亡擱淺」的神秘事件，開啟了生死兩界間的大門，彼世的生物在殘破不堪、關係疏離的末日世界四處遊蕩。 
 
玩家扮演山姆·布橋斯，一肩扛起責任，在面目全非的美國聯繫僅餘的倖存者，為人類社會帶來希望。 
你能一步步重新聯繫這個分崩離析的世界嗎？ 
 
《死亡擱淺導演剪輯版》Mac 版充分運用如 MetalFX Upscaling 等 Metal 3 功能，帶來無與倫比的精細畫質與驚人的效能。此外還包含高幀率的拍照模式，以及與 Valve Corporation 的《HALF-LIFE》系列和 CD Projekt Red 的 《電馭叛客 2077》的聯動內容。使用 Social Strand System™ 與全球玩家保持連繫。

tw.releaseNotes: 您，可曾幻想過真正主宰一個王朝的命運？這一次，您不再是旁觀者，而是化身主角，進入這部真人互動的宮廷生存影像作品！《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇——全新推出！您將掙脫命運的枷鎖，一步步走上那座象徵至高無上的龍椅。該如何書寫您的盛世天下？一切，由您親手決定！
tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。媚娘篇內容共十六集，女帝篇內容共三十二集，均含免費體驗章節。

您可能從沒體驗過這樣的作品——您當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險！
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇全新推出！誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

● 承襲《媚娘篇》佳績，再續宮廷傳奇
《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》媚娘篇贏得了廣大用戶的喜愛。
新篇《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇，邀您提前鎖定這場驚心動魄的朝堂博弈，共同期待東方女帝傳奇的登頂新巔峰！

● 4K電影級質感，重塑東方宮廷美學
全程真人演繹、實景打造，結合4K電影級光影調度，匠心重現東方宮闕的恢弘氣象。從華服錦緞、金釵搖曳的細膩質感，到震撼人心的中國風配樂，全方位呈現極致東方古典美學。由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演員傾情演出。更真實、更驚險刺激的體驗，更宏大的場景、更細膩的人物刻畫，讓盛世不再只存在於螢幕之中，而是於眼前真實展開。您將親身沉浸於「君臨天下」的東方美學盛宴！

● 從默默無聞的少女到傳奇女帝，您的劇本您來寫！
急欲掙脫命運的束縛？在本作品中，您將體驗最驚心動魄的宮廷權謀博弈！從默默無聞的少女，在多方勢力掣肘中突破困局，最終登上權力巔峰。感受運籌帷幄、制衡朝局的帝王智慧，這條逆天改命的稱帝之路，由您親手開創！

● 約1500分鐘真人演繹內容，沉浸體驗帝王人生
匠心打造的《媚娘篇》與《女帝篇》共約1500分鐘的實拍篇章，為您鋪展出一幅波瀾壯闊的盛世畫卷。面對詭譎多變的朝堂局勢，每一次落子、每一句對話，都將引發蝴蝶效應。高張力反轉、重重懸疑……在步步驚心中執掌乾坤，親手改寫王朝命運！
為您情有獨鍾或愛恨交織的角色應援助陣，誰能問鼎全球人氣榜首，皆由您一手掌控。

● 告別旁觀，真正體驗「朕即天下」
屏棄枯燥的點擊對話，深度互動玩法全面升級！權力不再只是一句空洞的台詞，而是您指尖真實運作的朝堂制衡

批閱奏摺：指尖輕點，趣解百態民生。面對層出不窮的新奇提案與市井趣事，看你如何妙筆生花、巧思破局，以奇招惠及萬民。

頒布聖旨：御筆輕懸，執掌群臣榮辱。看你如何恩威並施、論功行賞；透過封賞、發落與追貶，盡顯女帝知人善任的御人之道。

● 您是什麼類型的帝王？專屬人格測驗報告升級
在故事的終點，您還將獲得一份升級版專屬帝王測試報告！深度解析您的權謀風格、危機決策與馭人之道。究竟您是權情兼收、八面玲瓏的「絕命鶴頂紅」，還是至情至性、赴湯蹈火的「風月曼陀羅」，又或是心狠手辣、一心登頂的「卷王見手青」？在故事的最後，看見最真實的自己，並將您的專屬女帝圖鑑分享給全世界！

關於New One Studio

我們是專注於互動敘事的獨立團隊，致力於用創新手法融合東方文化與互動體驗。2019年，是一路同行的大家陪着《隱形守護者》走過 BAFTA 的榮光，更讓我們確信：好的互動敘事，能讓故事住進人心。這幾年，我們一頭栽進了古代盛世，醞釀了一個全新的故事。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》，不僅為大家呈現東方權謀的「致命」美學，同時帶來考驗智謀與膽識的朝堂博弈。

兩個作品，不同的故事，同一顆初心，希望全球用戶都能在遊玩中再一次感受東方傳統文化的魅力，它將成為跨越文化的橋樑，為每一位支持全動態影像作品的用戶帶來一次全新體驗。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》中，你將親自體驗一代女帝的成長之路。《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇聚焦於她傳奇的起點——看她如何從默默無聞的少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑智慧與膽識在險象環生的權力交鋒中存活下來。

在《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》女帝篇中，你將以執棋者的姿態直面更殘酷的朝堂博弈。運籌帷幄、制衡群臣，在波譎雲詭中開創盛世，親手書寫屬於你的盛世天下！

tw.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

tw.description:
「在遺失記憶的盡頭，奪回真正的魔王寶座！」

成為魔王，構築你專屬的無情地牢。
探索世界，集結散落各地的魔物，佈置致命陷阱，讓無禮的入侵者走向毀滅。

死亡並非終點，而是全新力量的開端。在Roguelike無盡的輪迴中，將你的地牢打造成最完美、最恐怖的堡壘！

[打造專屬地牢與防線]
你的策略就是魔王城的最高法則。在地圖各處佈置豐富多樣的戰鬥房間、凶險的建築與致命陷阱，為蜂擁而至的勇者們設計完美的「殺戮地帶（Kill Zone）」。

[組建強大的魔物大軍]
探索世界，喚醒沉睡中的各色怪物。將能力各異的魔物招入麾下，把它們培養成最強軍團，指揮前線作戰。

[釋放壓倒性的魔王權能]
入侵者正逼近地牢的核心嗎？解放魔王內心深處潛藏的真正力量吧。用足以瞬間逆轉戰局的毀滅性權能，讓傲慢的敵人屈膝臣服。

[難以預測的Roguelike變數]
每一次探索都會開啟全新的道路。收集隱藏在地牢各處的神秘遺物，化解未知而離奇的事件，讓你的部隊變得更加強大。你的選擇將決定下一場戰鬥的命運。

[記憶碎片與真正的覺醒]
即使戰敗倒下也絕不要停下腳步。收集過去遺失的記憶與遺產，覺醒魔王真正的力量。跨越死亡，奪回永遠無法被抹殺的絕對權威！

現在就坐上王座，統治你那宏偉而殘酷的專屬地牢吧！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。

tw.description:
《Digline》是一款輕鬆上手的鑽探遊戲。每一次向地下深入，都是一場在進度與風險之間的抉擇，而真正的獎勵，總藏在更深的地底。

每次探險都從你的工坊開始。選擇裝備，駕駛燃料有限、設備簡陋的鑽探機出發。開鑿屬於自己的路線，穿越不斷變化的地層，決定要收集哪些資源，並在燃料耗盡前，思考該升級什麼、交易什麼。

每一次下潛，都可能發現新的材料、更稀有的礦物，以及地底深處意想不到的規律。原本只是單純的挖掘，逐漸演變成探索、效率與時機掌握之間的巧妙平衡。

回到地面後，持續優化你的策略，讓每一次探險都更有效率：

• 升級鑽頭、燃料容量與鑽探效率
• 解鎖價值更高、埋藏更深的新材料
• 規劃最佳路線，讓每一次下潛都收穫滿滿

你的進度會穩定累積，但每一次探險都充滿張力。太過保守，就會錯失珍貴資源；冒險太深，則可能失去一切。

打造屬於自己的探勘節奏：快速有效率的短程挖掘、高風險高報酬的深層探險，或穩紮穩打，逐步征服地底世界。

曾登上美國、英國休閒遊戲排行榜前 10 名，以及德國、挪威等多國前 5 名。現在就加入這場挖掘冒險吧！

原本只是尋找資源的旅程，卻漸漸變得更加神秘。你挖出的隧道會永久保留，地圖會隨著探索不斷擴展，而地下世界也開始不像隨機生成，更像是一個擁有自己歷史的地方。

《Digline》設計理念就是容易上手、適合利用零碎時間遊玩，同時又能帶來長期的成就感。快速開挖、短程探險，享受源源不絕的輕鬆樂趣。

特色：

• 直覺式單指直向操作
• 每次探險只需一、兩分鐘，隨時都能遊玩
• 永久保留的地下隧道，以及持續擴展的地圖
• 多個地下區域，各自擁有不同的資源、危險與驚喜
• 收集資源，用於製作升級與更完善的探險準備
• 工坊系統，讓每一次成功探險都化為永久成長
• 市場交易系統，出售帶回來的資源
• 跨越多次遊戲持續累積的成長，而非單次探險
• 寧靜舒適的氛圍，搭配充滿探索感的地下世界
• 無廣告，沒有任何付費才能獲勝的機制

tw.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

你是吉佩托創造的人偶，陷入由謊言編織而成的羅網之中；你和降臨在《Lies of P》世界的事件之間，存在著難以想像的怪物和不可信賴的人物。
 
一個神秘的聲音將你喚醒，它引領你穿梭在瘟疫肆虐的克拉特市；這座曾經蓬勃發展的城市，如今已被瘋狂與血腥所毒害。在我們的魂系遊戲中，你必須調整自己和你的武器面對數不清的恐懼，解開城市精英們深不可測的秘密，並且在尋找自我的旅程中，選擇是否以真相面對困境，還是編織謊言克服困境。

- 陰鬱而優雅的殘酷世界
揭開克拉特城的秘密；這是一座曾經浸淫在「美好年代」風格的城市，也曾因為人偶產業而蓬勃發展，但如今，街頭滿是腥風血雨。
 
- 與變形的器械作戰
組合各種動態武器，充分利用軍團機械臂並啟動新技能，藉此發展出獨特的戰鬥風格以迎戰各種邪惡敵人與地形。
 
- 為何說謊？
許多時候，你得面臨抉擇；是否該用謊言撫慰悲傷絕望的人們，還是選擇告訴他們真相。
為自己劈荊斬棘。

- 重塑經典
體驗《木偶奇遇記》這部廣受喜愛的童話故事，遊戲中改以黑暗、冷酷的敘事讓玩家挖掘隱藏在《Lies of P》世界裡的秘密與符號。
tw.releaseNotes:
[更新 1.11.3]

注意事項

請於倉庫中確認道具

- 在「死亡挑戰」模式中，已損毀的武器現在會正確保留其損毀狀態和外觀，並延續至下一場戰鬥。

- 修正了已損毀武器在開始下一輪遊戲時耐久度未恢復的問題。
- 修正了戰鬥中某些敵人的迴避動作會錯誤觸發「旋風護符」效果的問題。

- 修正了頭目戰「冠軍」維克多進入第二階段後，其第一階段型態偶爾會短暫殘留的問題。
- 修正了頭目「雙面監督者」的入場動畫偶爾無法正確播放的問題。

-- 遇到此問題的玩家在更新後載入受影響的存檔即可解鎖該成就。
- 修正了波蘭語和日語版本成就描述中的文字錯誤。
- 修正了[設定 → 遊戲 → 動態模糊]選項未正確生效的問題。

已知問題

請在［設定 → 圖形］中，將畫面模式與解析度調整為您想要的數值後再進入遊戲。

us.description:
Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King.

Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back.

Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

us.description:
Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition.


► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival.

► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories.

► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage.

► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration.

► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful.

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

us.description:
This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters.

A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices!
Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power.

● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues
Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast!

● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story!
Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne.

● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life
With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate!
You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings.

● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm
A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips:

Review Memorials: With a press, witness your realm's lives—answer petitions, resolve disputes, and bring prosperity to your people.

Issue Edicts: Your imperial brush decides ministers' fate—reward merit, punish fault, and govern with wisdom.

● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked
At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile!

About New One Studio

An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, everyone who journeyed with The Invisible Guardian shared its BAFTA glory, reaffirming that great interactive storytelling can truly stay in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage.

us.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

us.releaseNotes:
[1.11.3 Update]

Important Notice
- Using software or data not officially distributed by the developer may cause the game to crash.
- Please make sure to always have your game updated to the latest version.
Failing to do so may result in crashes, save data errors, or even irreversible data loss.
If you are starting Lies of P for the first time, please make sure to update to the latest version before you begin.

Please be sure to check your Storage for the item.



Bug Fixes
- In Death March, destroyed weapons now correctly retain their destroyed status and appearance when continuing to the next battle.
- Fixed an issue in Death March where destroyed weapons were not repaired after selecting "Select another boss" or "Restart from the beginning".
- Fixed a bug where the increased damage from the "Uroboros’s Eye" Handle Fable Arts was not applied correctly.
- Fixed a bug where closing the game with a weapon's durability at 0 caused it to be displayed as destroyed after relaunching the game.
- Fixed a bug where the durability of destroyed weapon were not restored when starting the next playthrough.
- Fixed a bug where the effect of the "Whirlwind Amulet" was activated by certain enemies' dodge actions during combat.
- Fixed a bug where some monsters would not take damage from the "Sharp Pipe" in certain situations.
- Fixed a bug that caused Champion Victor's Phase 1 form to occasionally remain for a short time after entering Phase 2 of his boss fight.
- Fixed a bug where the Two-faced Overseer's boss entrance animation would occasionally not play correctly.

us.description:
You are a puppet created by Geppetto who’s caught in a web of lies with unimaginable monsters and untrustworthy figures standing between you and the events that have befallen the world of Lies of P.
 
You are awakened by a mysterious voice that guides you through the plagued city of Krat - a once lively place that has been poisoned by madness and bloodlust. In our soulslike, you must adapt yourself and your weapons to face untold horrors, untangle the unfathomable secrets of the city's elites and choose whether to confront predicaments with the truth or weave lies to overcome them on the journey to find yourself.


- A DARKLY ELEGANT AND CRUEL WORLD
Unearth the secrets of the city of Krat – a place soaked in the style of the Belle Epoque era which once thrived due to its puppet industry and now sees its streets covered in blood.
 
- BATTLE WITH TWISTED INSTRUMENTS
Develop a unique combat style to counter vicious enemies and terrain by weaving together dynamic weapon combinations, utilizing the Legion Arms, and activating new abilities.
 
- WHAT’S IN A LIE?
There will be times when you will be confronted with choices where you can give comfort to others in sorrow or despair by lying…or you can choose to tell the truth. 
Carve your own path.
 
- A CLASSIC REIMAGINED
Experience the beloved fairy tale of Pinocchio reinterpreted as a dark, grim narrative that allows players to discover the secrets and symbols hidden within the world of Lies of P.

From legendary game creator Hideo Kojima comes a genre-defying experience, now expanded in this definitive DIRECTOR’S CUT. 
 
In the future, a mysterious event known as the Death Stranding has opened a doorway between the living and the dead, leading to grotesque creatures from the afterlife roaming the fallen world marred by a desolate society. 
 
As Sam Bridges, your mission is to deliver hope to humanity by connecting the last survivors of a decimated America. 
 Can you reunite the shattered world, one step at a time?

DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT on iOS includes a HIGH FRAME RATE, PHOTO MODE, and cross-over content from Valve Corporation's HALF-LIFE series and CD Projekt Red's Cyberpunk 2077. Stay connected with players around the globe with the Social Strand System™.

Mac and iOS

You can start the game once you have downloaded approximately 13 GB, but additional downloads will occur as the game progresses, requiring a total of approximately 50 GB of downloads. us.description:
Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground.

Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out.

Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing.

Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs:

• Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency
• Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement
• Optimize routes to maximize each descent

Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all.

Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below.

Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun!

What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history.

Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun.

Features:

• intuitive one-finger portrait controls
• short runs that fit easily into a minute or two
• persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition
• multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises
• resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation
• a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress
• a market system for trading what you bring back
• progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run
• a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it
• no ads, and no pay-to-win systems
• by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase
• achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition

The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

To wash away the shame of defeat two years ago, Chaos has gathered an alien coalition, attacking Earth once more, citing humanity's sins as justification.
Even the once-defending superhero now turns against us. As the commander, how will you resolve this crisis? What lies ahead for humanity and Earth?

Game Intro
Kaiju Attack 2, the sequel to our critically acclaimed title released two years ago, builds upon the strengths of the first installment while addressing its shortcomings. We've introduced numerous new features and enhancements, including:
- Faster-paced and more intense gameplay.
- Introduction of currency tiles alongside the existing three types.
- Ability to deploy multiple types of secret weapons simultaneously.
- Nine new alien bosses with smarter, more cunning behavior AI for increased challenge.
- Eight new secret weapons, including super robots capable of splitting into three separate units and combining.

tr.description:
"Reclaim Your Throne as the True Dark Lord!"

Awaken as an amnesiac Dark Lord in an endless dream world and construct your own ruthless dungeon. Explore the realm to rally scattered monsters, deploy deadly traps, and bring ruin to insolent invaders.

Death is not the end, but the beginning of new power. Through endless roguelike runs, forge your DUNGEON into the ultimate, inescapable fortress!

[Design & Defend Your Dungeon]
Your strategy becomes the absolute law of the dungeon. Deploy diverse combat rooms, sinister structures, and lethal traps to create the ultimate kill zone for incoming heroes.

[Raise a Formidable Monster Army]
Explore the world to awaken diverse monsters from their deep slumber. Draft creatures with unique abilities and racial synergies into your ranks, and command the frontline with the ultimate monstrous horde.

[Unleash the Dark Lord's Authority]
Are the invaders breaching your dungeon's core? Unleash the true power dormant within the Dark Lord. Turn the tide of battle instantly with devastating abilities that will bring arrogant foes to their knees.

[Unpredictable Roguelike Encounters]
Every run paves a new path. Collect mysterious relics hidden throughout the dungeon, navigate through bizarre unknown events, and empower your forces. Your choices will dictate the fate of the next battle.

[Fragments of Memory & True Awakening]
Do not stop even if you fall in battle. Gather fragments of lost memories and legacies from past runs to awaken the Dark Lord's true power. Transcend death and reclaim your eternal, absolute authority.

Take your rightful place on the throne now and dominate your own grand, brutal dungeon!

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs.

This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

Main Features:
- Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls.
- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.
- Enable vibration before each redial.
- Call history and retry stats.

Perfect for:
- Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.)
- Customer service or tech support
- Calling public offices
- Freelancers and business owners following up clients

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

tr.description:
Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition.


► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival.

► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories.

► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage.

► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration.

► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful.

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

pt.description:
Xadrez, mas todo o seu exército passou para o lado das brancas, deixando-o com nada além de sua espingarda real e seu orgulho ferido. Levado por sua loucura sombria, você decide que é hora de ensinar as peças brancas a temer o Rei da Espingarda.

A cada turno, você pode mover seu rei ou atirar nas peças inimigas, recarregando sua espingarda a cada movimento. Evite o xeque-mate e mate o rei inimigo para concluir o nível. Depois de cada nível, você pode escolher entre duas combinações aleatórias de uma melhoria para você e uma melhoria para o outro lado. Escolha sabiamente e continue vencendo os níveis, e você poderá recuperar seu reino.

As partidas podem levar cerca de 20 minutos para serem concluídas. O jogo apresenta 15 níveis de dificuldade, cartas desbloqueáveis, mais de 100 conquistas para completar, um modo infinito e um novo modo de perseguição em que você é continuamente atacado por todos os lados!

pt.description:
Earthquake Network is the most comprehensive app on earthquakes and for most world countries it is the only earthquake early warning system for receiving real time alerts.

Earthquake Network gives you:

- Real time alerts if you live close to the epicentre
- Alerts seconds in advances if you live far from the epicentre
- Real time user reports on felt earthquakes
- Free earthquake data from 21 seismic networks including U.S., Puerto Rico, India, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, Argentina, Venezuela, Dominican Republic, Colombia, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, China, New Zeland, Japan, Italy, Croatia, Spain and Greece

The Earthquake Network research project (https://www.sismo.app) aims at developing a smartphone-based earthquake early warning system able to detect earthquakes in real time and to alert the population in advance. Smartphones are able to detect earthquakes thanks to the accelerometer on-board each device. When an earthquake is detected, users with the application installed are immediatly alerted. Since earthquake waves travel at around 5 km/s it is possible to alert the population not yet reached by the damaging waves of the earthquake. For the scientific details about the project please refer to the scientific paper on Frontiers at https://bit.ly/2C8B5HI

Subscriptions:

When an earthquake is detected in real time by smartphones near the epicenter, the server sends an alert to all users with the app. Alerting all users can take up to 10 seconds since it is not technically feasible to do so instantly. Now you can join the priority lists of the first 10,000 or 100,000 people alerted in real time. The following subscriptions are available:

- Subscription 10k for 1 year
- Subscription 10k for 1 month 

- Subscription 100k for 1 year
- Subscription 100k for 1 month 

• Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase
• Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period

• Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable

pt.description:
"Reclaim Your Throne as the True Dark Lord!"

Awaken as an amnesiac Dark Lord in an endless dream world and construct your own ruthless dungeon. Explore the realm to rally scattered monsters, deploy deadly traps, and bring ruin to insolent invaders.

Death is not the end, but the beginning of new power. Through endless roguelike runs, forge your DUNGEON into the ultimate, inescapable fortress!

[Design & Defend Your Dungeon]
Your strategy becomes the absolute law of the dungeon. Deploy diverse combat rooms, sinister structures, and lethal traps to create the ultimate kill zone for incoming heroes.

[Raise a Formidable Monster Army]
Explore the world to awaken diverse monsters from their deep slumber. Draft creatures with unique abilities and racial synergies into your ranks, and command the frontline with the ultimate monstrous horde.

[Unleash the Dark Lord's Authority]
Are the invaders breaching your dungeon's core? Unleash the true power dormant within the Dark Lord. Turn the tide of battle instantly with devastating abilities that will bring arrogant foes to their knees.

[Unpredictable Roguelike Encounters]
Every run paves a new path. Collect mysterious relics hidden throughout the dungeon, navigate through bizarre unknown events, and empower your forces. Your choices will dictate the fate of the next battle.

[Fragments of Memory & True Awakening]
Do not stop even if you fall in battle. Gather fragments of lost memories and legacies from past runs to awaken the Dark Lord's true power. Transcend death and reclaim your eternal, absolute authority.

Take your rightful place on the throne now and dominate your own grand, brutal dungeon!

Com esta aplicação, pode fazer chamadas automáticas para os números que desejar de forma eficiente e personalizada. Pode definir o número de repetições, o intervalo entre chamadas, adicionar um posto, ativar a vibração antes de marcar e até mesmo agendar as suas chamadas utilizando um calendário integrado. A Auto Redial App oferece ainda uma interface simples e intuitiva, um histórico de chamadas detalhado e várias opções de personalização para se adequar às suas necessidades.

Esta aplicação é ideal para quem precisa de fazer chamadas repetitivas automaticamente — como uma chamada para uma consulta, uma nova tentativa de chamada quando o número está ocupado ou contactar serviços onde a linha está ocupada.

Principais características:
- Redisque automaticamente as chamadas ocupadas ou não atendidas.
- Defina o número de tentativas e os intervalos de tempo.
- Agende chamadas com antecedência via calendário.
- Adicione os ramais automaticamente após a marcação.
- Ative a vibração antes de cada rediscagem.
- Histórico de chamadas e estatísticas de novas tentativas.

Perfeito para:
- Marcação de consultas (médicas, embaixadas, etc.)
- Atendimento ao cliente ou suporte técnico
- Telefonar para repartições públicas
- Freelancers e empresários a acompanhar clientes

Quer esteja a ligar para marcar uma consulta médica, falar com o serviço de apoio ao cliente ou apenas a tentar ligar-se quando a linha está ocupada, esta aplicação poupa tempo e frustração.

pt.description:
Finalmente, o premiado slash-'em-up da Heart Machine chega ao iOS na sua versão mais polida e refinada de sempre, a Special Edition.


► Vencedor dos prémios "Audience Award" e "Excellence in Visual Art" do prestigiado Independent Games Festival.

► Mais de 14 nomeações nas categorias Melhor Design Visual, Melhor Áudio e Melhor Jogo Original.

► 9/10 Destructoid « Um exemplo de excelência. Podem existir falhas, mas são insignificantes e não causam granes estragos. »

► 9,5/10 Game Informer « A combinação da banda sonora, dos gráficos e dos combates cria um ambiente complexo que vale a pena explorar. »

► Recomendado pela Eurogamer « O slash-'em-up da Heart Machine é esgotante e preciso - e incrivelmente belo. »

► 9/10 GameSpot « É mais do que simplesmente bonito; o Hyper Light Drifter usa os seus gráficos para te guiar e relaxar. As paisagens magníficas desaceleram a pulsação entre sequências de combate difíceis, que te deixam sem fôlego. »

► 8,5 Polygon « O Hyper Light Drifter combina habilmente momentos contemplativos com ação vertiginosa. »

► 5 Estrelas Darkstation « O RPG de ação, visto de cima, Hyper Light Drifter é um jogo espantoso: lindo, um mundo fascinante para explorar, controlos sem falhas, música magnífica e a confiança no jogador que o fará descobrir as coisas sozinho. »


Os ecos de um passado sombrio e violento ressoam através das terras selvagens, repletas de tesouros e sangue. Os Drifters deste mundo são os colecionadores de conhecimentos esquecidos, tecnologias perdidas e histórias desfeitas. O nosso Drifter é assombrado por uma doença insaciável, viajando pelas terras do Tempo Sepultado, na esperança de descobrir uma forma de apaziguar a doença cruel.

Hyper Light Drifter é um RPG de ação/aventura ao estilo dos melhores clássicos de 16 bits, com mecânicas modernizadas e gráficos numa escala grandiosamente superior. Explora um vasto mundo deslumbrante e em ruínas, repleto de perigos e tecnologias esquecidas.


Características:

● Jogabilidade de 120 fps no iPad Pro / 60 fps no iPhone e iPad.
● Compatível com controladores MFi.
● Conquistas no Game Center.
● Vibração táctil.
● Desde as personagens aos elementos subtis do cenário, tudo foi concebido à mão com o maior dos afetos.
● Fácil de aprender, difícil de dominar; os inimigos são cruéis e numerosos, os perigos podem esmagar facilmente o teu corpo frágil e os rostos amigáveis são raros.
● Melhora as armas, aprende novas habilidades, descobre equipamentos e atravessa um mundo sombrio e detalhado onde abundam encruzilhadas e segredos.
● Banda sonora evocativa criada por Disasterpeace.
● Todo o conteúdo do jogo original + mais armas, inimigos e áreas da Special Edition.

Você é um títere criado por Geppetto, preso numa teia de mentiras com monstros inimagináveis e figuras pouco confiáveis que ficarão entre você e os eventos no mundo de Lies of P.
 
Uma voz misteriosa desperta você e guia seus passos pela atormentada cidade de Krat — um lugar outrora animado que foi envenenado pela loucura e sede de sangue. Em nosso soulslike, você deve adaptar suas armas e seu personagem para enfrentar horrores incalculáveis, desvendar os segredos insondáveis das elites da cidade e escolher entre confrontar as dificuldades com a verdade ou tecer mentiras para superá-las na jornada para encontrar a si mesmo.


- UM MUNDO SOMBRIAMENTE ELEGANTE E CRUEL
Descubra os segredos da cidade de Krat — um lugar imerso no estilo da era belle époque que já prosperou devido à sua indústria de títeres e agora se encontra com as ruas cobertas de sangue.
 
- LUTE COM INSTRUMENTOS PERVERSOS
Desenvolva um estilo de combate único para combater inimigos e terrenos cruéis, com combinações de armas dinâmicas, o uso de Braço Legionário e a ativação de novas habilidades.
 
- O QUE HÁ EM MENTIR?
Haverá momentos em que você será confrontado com escolhas nas quais poderá mentir para confortar outras pessoas em sofrimento ou desespero… ou poderá optar por dizer a verdade. 
 
 Trace seu próprio caminho.
 
- UM CLÁSSICO REINVENTADO
Experimente o amado conto de fadas de Pinóquio reinterpretado como uma narrativa sombria que permite aos jogadores descobrir os segredos e símbolos escondidos no mundo de Lies of P.
pt.releaseNotes:
[1.11.3 Update]

Important Notice
- Using software or data not officially distributed by the developer may cause the game to crash.
- Please make sure to always have your game updated to the latest version.
Failing to do so may result in crashes, save data errors, or even irreversible data loss.
If you are starting Lies of P for the first time, please make sure to update to the latest version before you begin.
- If your Bag is full when you pick up an item, the item will be sent to the Storage.
Please be sure to check your Storage for the item.



Bug Fixes
- In Death March, destroyed weapons now correctly retain their destroyed status and appearance when continuing to the next battle.
- Fixed an issue in Death March where destroyed weapons were not repaired after selecting "Select another boss" or "Restart from the beginning".
- Fixed a bug where the increased damage from the "Uroboros’s Eye" Handle Fable Arts was not applied correctly.
- Fixed a bug where closing the game with a weapon's durability at 0 caused it to be displayed as destroyed after relaunching the game.
- Fixed a bug where the durability of destroyed weapon were not restored when starting the next playthrough.
- Fixed a bug where the effect of the "Whirlwind Amulet" was activated by certain enemies' dodge actions during combat.
- Fixed a bug where some monsters would not take damage from the "Sharp Pipe" in certain situations.
- Fixed a bug that caused Champion Victor's Phase 1 form to occasionally remain for a short time after entering Phase 2 of his boss fight.
- Fixed a bug where the Two-faced Overseer's boss entrance animation would occasionally not play correctly.
- Adjusted the dialogue order for some NPCs to be more natural.
- Fixed a bug that allowed movement to unintended areas outside the normal route.
- Fixed a bug where Death Ergo was occasionally dropped in an unintended location.
- Fixed a bug where the "Extreme Potential" achievement could not be obtained through "P-Organ Recalibration".
-- Players who encountered this bug can unlock this achievement by loading the affected save data after this patch.
- Fixed typos in the achievement descriptions for Polish and Japanese.
- Fixed a bug where the Motion Blur setting in [Settings → Gameplay → Motion Blur] was not applied correctly.



Known Issues
- Purchasing Lies of P: Overture from the title screen may switch your screen mode to "Borderless Screen Mode" and reset your resolution settings.
You can change your display and resolution settings back in [Settings → Graphics].
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

pt.description:
O lendário criador Hideo Kojima traz uma nova experiência no género, agora expandida nesta VERSÃO DO REALIZADOR definitiva. 
 
No futuro, um evento misterioso conhecido como Death Stranding abriu uma porta entre os vivos e os mortos, levando criaturas grotescas da vida após a morte a vaguear por um mundo caído manchado por uma sociedade desolada. 
 
No papel de Sam Bridges, resgata a humanidade ligando os últimos sobreviventes de uma América dizimada. 
 Conseguirás voltar a unir o mundo estilhaçado, passo a passo? 
 
DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR’S CUT para Mac faz uso total dos recursos do Metal 3, como o MetalFX Upscaling, permitindo uma fidelidade gráfica imbatível e um desempenho incrível. Também inclui TAXA ALTA DE FOTOGRAMAS, MODO DE FOTOS e conteúdos interligados da série HALF-LIFE, da Valve Corporation; e de Cyberpunk 2077, da CD Projekt Red. Liga-te a jogadores de todo o mundo com o Social Strand System™.

Mac e iOS
• É necessário iniciar sessão pelo iCloud e ativar o iCloudDrive para jogar este produto.
• Este produto pode ser jogado offline, mas é necessária uma ligação à internet para tirar o proveito máximo do Social Strand System™. Serão cobradas taxas de comunicação ao jogar online.

Apenas para a versão iOS
• Ao jogares este produto pela primeira vez, ser-te-á pedido que descarregues dados adicionais. Podes iniciar o jogo depois de descarregares aproximadamente 13 GB., mas serão feitos downloads adicionais conforme o jogo avança, culminando num total aproximado de 50 GB. de downloads. Serão feitos mais downloads quando forem utilizados dados de voz de idiomas adicionais.

FAQs
